message:
fix: remove version specifier from dev-deps on ftui-harness

ftui-layout (Layer 3) and ftui-runtime (Layer 5) had versioned
dev-dependencies on ftui-harness (Layer 7). During crates.io publish,
cargo tries to resolve versioned deps from the registry before
ftui-harness is published, causing a circular ordering failure.

Removing the version specifier from these dev-deps lets cargo resolve
them via path locally while not requiring them on crates.io.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
